reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Very disappointed and not satisfied with the college infrastructure and facilities .

review_content.Placements: The college has a policy that they will provide placement but I don't know if they really do. All students have to find jobs themselves. Jobs are difficult to find because we have to go to many places and give many interviews, which the college does not support.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in our college; it is only for teachers. There is no AC facility for students in college, only in the principal's room. There are only four fans in a big hall, which makes it difficult for students to study in scorching heat. In hostel, the condition of fans is very poor. There is no AC in the hostel; even a table fan is not allowed. If any student bring table fan from home, they take it from the students and never return the items again .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college took the responsibility of developing students' careers.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Sunflower, etc. About 40% of students got internships. The top role offered is a drug inspector.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has good labs and classrooms. The hostel is very good. It contains 50 rooms. The hostel can accommodate 100 students. It has a well-furnished mess. The food is made of good quality vegetables, and they take care of student hygiene.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are great and helpful. They are qualified and gentle. They have a lot of knowledge. B.Pharma course is a good course because it's the future of our generation, so it can make students' life better than they think. Semester exams are not much difficult because of our teachers. Our college comes under PTU, which is Punjab Technical University.

content.Placements: They didn't even have the job fair when we passed out. None of our batchmates got placed that year. Since then, they have not had any job fest. As no one got placed, there is nothing to write about roles, top recruiting companies, internships or anything related.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is for just staff. They have Chemistry labs which are okay. The library is also great—classrooms are under CCTV. The canteen is significant in the area. They have a ground for basketball, and hand banality is okay. First aid kit if that counts in medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It has value for money and is a good college for diploma students.

content.Placements: The lowest salary package offered in our course is about 3 LPA, and the highest salary package offered was about 6 LPA. Recruiting companies are Wipro, Bajaj, HCL, Godrej, IBM, and many more. Top role offered in our course is junior engineer. We also get roles from call centers, data operators, and HR in a company.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi, labs, library, classrooms and everything in our college. Sweepers clean the labs, classrooms, and library in a very healthy manner. Mess is hygienic, and they prepare food in a very healthy manner. Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel. Canteen exists in college. Sports period is divided like other subjects.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The course is not easy, and the faculty members are not well-behaved.

review_content.Placements: All the students get placed, but the packages are very low. Others will start clinics privately. After the course, there is a mandatory internship which is paid, but in government colleges, it is 25,000, and here, it is 4,500 maximum. The course has vast possibilities and branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and the library have ample facilities. Sports don't have much importance, but the student union will take the good initiative to conduct sports, arts, charity, and creative programs. Hostel food is also quite good compared to other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am very much satisfied.

review_content.Placements: We had 100 batchmates in my enrollment year of 2016. The lowest package was Rs. 23,000 per year, then comes Rs. 44000, which I used to pay and Rs. 2,10,000 for general merit. Management quota charges 5,00,000 per year. Every student in the batch got an internship at the same college.
review_content.Infrastructure: We had a free Wi-Fi limit every day. The labs were cool and large. Classrooms are very well ventilated. We have a very resourceful library on the campus. When it comes to the mess, the food quality and quantity were very nice. We had an affordable canteen. Every year, sports and arts were conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college with good infrastructure, facilities, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average, and the campus is small. Lab facilities are available. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners, whiteboards, and projectors. The library has good collection of books. Our college has three canteens. Bus facility is available. The quality of the food served is average. Medical facilities are available. For sports, we have a small basketball court and a volleyball net. There is a garden on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am personally not satisfied because I took admission against my parent's wishes.
reviews.review_text: It was okay, its a private college so I don't think so anybody will face any issues in it. Else there is no ground to play or other curriculum activities. Wi-Fi is not available in college, library is available but you are not going to study something that anybody will need of it.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities like computer labs, canteens, IT classrooms, a hostel, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of the overall exposure provided.
reviews.review_text: The infra is average with facilities such as classrooms,  1-2 labs, a library with 4-5 computers, etc. There is no hostel in the college. There is a small playground to sit and talk. Sports and games are not good. There is no Wi-Fi and no projector facility in the classes. Washrooms are also not proper. The location is prime but its infra is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are good here, but you need to work for them.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good enough, but the food in the mess is average. The campus is small. You just have very few places to hang out. All you do have is three canteens and no good food in either of them.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with our college and faculty members are very helpful and caring towards every student.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 2 lifts but the only problem is that students are not allowed to use lifts but we use it without permission. I do not live in hostel but I know that the quality of food served in the hostel is too good as one of my friends brings us food from the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Indeed best faculty, good infrastructure, good placements, and they provide good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, the facilities and infrastructure that JIMS has are more than good because all classrooms are well air-conditioned. The benches they provide are good and the classrooms are well maintained. In our college, we have three canteens and one of them is the best because it is very similar to fancy cafes. The only drawback that our college has is that we don't have that much big ground or court to play on, but we have cricket nets and a volleyball court which is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: A well-maintained college with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and the canteen is also maintained. The library is also well maintained. Quality of food is also good for sports activities. College also provides facilities to play games but the rules are strict even though, they have a 75% attendance criteria which they should remove asap.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college that has average infrastructure but has good crowd and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is only for the teachers not for the students. Classrooms are clean and they take care of all the required necessities like air-conditioners are working properly and are good in condition. Labs and library are fine. I only faced some problems in the library like sometimes, there is no previous year question paper available. Otherwise, it's okay.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but I want to say that the fees you are paying is not worth it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay. We have a separate parking, a badminton court,  2 canteens and Nescafe etc. In each classroom, we have two air conditioners, 1 smart board and 1 projector board. Labs are also very big. In labs, we have 40 to 45 PCs, so that all students can practice.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided are up to the mark. The classrooms are air-conditioned and have projectors, which is very convenient for students. There are 4 canteens here, that have a lot of varieties of foods. Sports like basketball, badminton and table tennis are available.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to start your career.
reviews.review_text: If we talk about infrastructure, the college is almost providing everything like labs, smart air-conditioned classrooms, library, etc. The hostel is also good providing all the facilities. The only thing which is not good here is Wi-Fi setups are not available, and quality food is not served.

reviews.review_heading: It has excellent faculty members with good internships opportunities but bad infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The network connection has no problems, meanwhile, the classrooms are a bit messy and seats aren't up to the mark. Computer labs and library have no complaints. They take 100% care of the medical facilities. There are total 4 canteens and they serve the best food at an affordable price. Its sports week in January that's all for cricket, football, and badminton. Though we can play volleyball and basketball in the college playground as well.

reviews.review_heading: JIMS Sector-3 Rohini is part of a larger educational group named Jagannath Institution.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is pretty good, with excellent classrooms and washrooms. The furniture is very good, and classrooms and libraries are well-ventilated and air-conditioned. They use smart boards in every classroom, and the washrooms are also clean.

reviews.review_heading: Life in JIMS is amazing and worthy of the fees charged by the college for the particular course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the Journalism department are good that is more than average. There is no Wi-Fi available but the classes infrastructure is amazing. There are 2 ACs and 5 fans in each class. The library has an enormous number of books and magazines and it is huge. There are radio and tv studios available. Medical facilities are average and almost all main kinds of sports are available like football, basketball, volleyball, etc.
